title: stupid baby mod
description:
!! LOUD NOISES !!

a mod that adds a bunch of different baby mobs, items, blocks, weapons.
body:
# THERE WILL BE A DESCRIPTION REWORK ONCE MOD IS FINISHED

[Latest Version](https://modrinth.com/mod/stupid-baby-mod/version/latest)

### You have full permission to reupload this mod ONLY if you have added stuff apart of this mod. and via permission

## FEATURES
# _**MOBS**_

## BABY
which eats any mob which is a instakill.

## FLOATIE BABY
is what you'd usually see at night/caves, DO NOT ATTACK. IT IS NOT SAFE UNLESS YOU HAVE GOOD LOOT OR KNOW HOW TO TRAP IT

## IT...
One of the main babys. Is fast and can spawn sometimes at day. Safe to leave alone unless you know how to trap it.

## BABY SCREAMER
This is a mob that if you get within 12 blocks of it. it runs away and if you get within 8 blocks it screams and summons 4 tall babys.

## JUMPER BABY/TALL BABY
A tall baby that can go up to 14 blocks upwards. it is fast and deals quite alot of damage.

## GOD
This thing will spawn if too many bad things happen. Heres a list of im pretty sure most of them: Poo fluid living entitys, Baby launcher being activated, Babys dying,
It has alot of health and is not safe to be near to be around once spawned.

## TWO BABY
A baby that has 2 babies. (huge refrence from two time??)

## AUDIBLE NEWBORN
you dont want to know

# _**MINI-BOSSES**_

## BABY COLA (ENTITY)
The baby-cola is the first mini-boss added to the baby-mod. its a baby shaped as a cola. and drops a cola on death

# **_ITEMS_**

## CLAWS
Does 12 damage and right click boosts you up. spawning poop at the bottom. Used for easy escapes. slows you down but gives you extra strength after the fall.

## BABY LAUNCHER
Its a launcher that launches **Dead Babys**. its somewhat OP somewhat not so you should really conserve ammo like you conserve arrows.

## WATER FRAGMENT
Makes you be able to breathe under water, faster underwater, and mine faster. lasts for 145 ticks

## BABY SCARER RADIO
A Radio that scares any nearby babys of all types.

## ASHES
Quite literally just ashes.

## BABY COLA (ITEM)
A cola dropped from the Baby Cola (ENTITY). Once used with the activated mini-boss summoner you can get some loot

# **_BIOMES_**

## BABY WASTELAND
A biome that has the ground of poop and every varient of baby can spawn there. The sky is dark brown, Beneath the surface the once-known dirt is now a block covered in dead babies. Its also raining poop at all times in this biome.

## BABY HELL
A biome that has the ground of poop but with dead babys on it. its EXTREMELY rare. post a video of it in the discord server showing that you dont have admin commands if you want to show your finding.

**_~~it awaits~~_**
